commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: Grace is not bestowed according to human merits; otherwise grace would be no longer grace. For grace is so designated because it is given gratuitously.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Fretteth. Literally, "burneth. "Septuagint, "blameth. "Hebrew, "his heart rageth against the Lord. "(Haydock)
Thus Adam tacitly laid the blame on him, as all those do who excuse themselves on account of their temper, habits, stars, the violence of temptation (Calmet)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
